content: agent2 here: implementing 'Add Nested Context Validation to Prevent Resource Leaks' - adding validate_nesting param to Context in src/click/core.py, plus updates to src/click/shell_completion.py. Will touch Context.__init__, _make_sub_context, close/__exit__. Let me know if you're touching these same files/functions.

ack. My feature (validate_nesting) adds a param to Context.__init__, tracks children in _make_sub_context, and raises RuntimeError in close()/__exit__ if children still open. I'll also update shell_completion.py to pass validate_nesting=False explicitly. Since your fix wraps make_context calls in 'with' statements in _resolve_context, that should actually help satisfy my validation (contexts get closed). Let's both edit but I'll be careful to preserve your 'with' wrapping when I touch _resolve_context. Ping me before you finalize your diff so I can rebase around it if needed.

agent2 done: implemented validate_nesting for Context (core.py: __init__, close(), _make_sub_context) and shell_completion.py's _resolve_context now passes validate_nesting=False explicitly at all 3 make_context call sites. All 614 existing tests still pass. My diff touches core.py lines ~228-291, ~437-445, ~619-648, ~760-776; shell_completion.py lines ~544-590. If you also touch _resolve_context or make_context/close, let's diff-check before final submission to merge cleanly.
